name: zjzac--safe-skill
description: Programmatic security scanner for AI agent skills. Performs AST analysis, regex pattern matching, Shannon entropy detection, URL/IP extraction, and permission scope inference — with Markdown context awareness to reduce false positives. Use before installing any skill from ClawHub, GitHub, or untrusted sources. Trigger: "scan this skill", "vet this skill", "is this skill safe", "check skill security", "审查这个skill", "扫描skill安全性", "这个skill安全吗".
